title: Temporally count items

china-office.reason: Counting needs repeated observation of the same items over time; the static scan doesn't exercise it.

dimsim-spatial-memory.reason: A single walkthrough — no temporal-count target.

human-activity.reason: On hold alongside item 6 — would build on the activity scenario's per-item ObjectDB.detections_count accumulated over the NPC run, but that's most useful once item 6 (activity recognition) resumes.

summary_html: Track counts of detected items and entities over time — how many chairs today vs. yesterday, how often the cup moves. No implementation yet, but item 2 has already laid the groundwork.

cards.title: Dedup over time exists
cards.html: ObjectDB already merges repeat sightings, so "how many distinct cups" is a database query, not new perception work.

cards.title: Per-item counters exist
cards.html: Every Object.detections_count is a running observation count, incremented on each merged sighting.

cards.title: What's missing
cards.html: A time axis: snapshotting counts per interval, retention, and a query/skill surface for "counts over the last hour/day."

skills_note: no skill yet (on hold) — will build on ObjectDB (dimos/perception/detection/objectDB.py) and Object.detections_count
hold_note_html: Paused for this release alongside items 6/7 — a temporal count skill is far more useful once activities (not just static items) can be counted the same way, so this isn't being pursued further while item 6 is on hold.
